personal.name: Md Abidur Rahman
personal.title: Full Stack Developer
personal.subtitle: Engineering Pixels Into Seamless Experiences
personal.bio: Hi, I'm Abidur Rahman, a Full Stack Engineer passionate about building modern web applications, immersive user experiences, and scalable software solutions. Currently contributing at Tech Innovators Ltd, where I transform business requirements into premium digital experiences using React, Next.js, TypeScript, and modern full-stack technologies.

experience.description: Architecting next-gen enterprise solutions, implementing secure user authentication, and scaling performant application states with microservices architecture.
Contributed to modern product engineering, collaborating within enterprise-grade development pipelines to ship clean, highly optimized frontend features.

projects.title: AI-Powered Analytics Platform
projects.description: Enterprise-grade analytics dashboard with real-time data visualization, AI-driven insights, and interactive charts.

projects.title: EcoTrack - Sustainability App
projects.description: Mobile-first web app for tracking carbon footprint and sustainability goals. Features gamification and community challenges.

projects.title: ArtVault - NFT Marketplace
projects.description: Curated NFT marketplace with 3D art previews, seamless wallet integration, and social features.

services.title: Full-Stack Web Apps
services.description: Building production-ready applications tailored for high scalability and clean modular architecture.

services.title: Performance Optimization
services.description: Fine-tuning Core Web Vitals, SSR, and caching strategies for instantaneous load speeds.

services.title: Immersive 3D/XR Web
services.description: Creating breathtaking spatial experiences using Three.js with optimized draw calls.

services.title: Cloud & DevOps
services.description: Configuring secure cloud environments, SSL certificates, and CI/CD pipelines.
